arguments.command_line:
cd /workspace/game-2048 && python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('src/App.tsx')
text = p.read_text()
text = text.replace("import { BOARD_SIZE, createInitialGame, nextGameState, type Direction, type GameState } from './game'","import { createInitialGame, nextGameState, type Direction, type GameState } from './game'")
p.write_text(text)

p = Path('tsconfig.app.json')
text = p.read_text()
text = text.replace('"jsx": "react-jsx",','"jsx": "react-jsx",\n    "types": ["vitest/globals"],')
p.write_text(text)
PY
npm run build
